Risk Description: 14 legacy shared administrator accounts remain active in on-premises Active Directory — prevents individual accountability and session attribution
Remediation Notes: PAM project in progress; accounts identified and documented; migration plan approved. Critical to complete before October audit.

Risk Description: Encryption at rest not enabled for 3 Azure Blob Storage containers holding client PII — data exposed if storage account is compromised
Remediation Notes: Azure storage encryption retrofit in progress. Two of five containers remediated as of February 2026.

Risk Description: 23 Azure service accounts not enrolled in MFA — provisioned prior to MFA mandate and not yet migrated to managed identity
Remediation Notes: Service account MFA migration project initiated Q1 2026. 8 of 23 accounts migrated as of March 2026.

Risk Description: Third-party vendor Clearbridge Analytics has standing 24/7 access to the Zava data warehouse — no time-limited or supervised access controls in place
Remediation Notes: Vendor access review initiated. New Third-Party Access Agreement drafted and under legal review. Interim control: enhanced logging of Clearbridge sessions.

Risk Description: Incident response plan has not been tested (tabletop exercise) in 18 months — last test was April 2024
Remediation Notes: Tabletop exercise scheduled for September 2026. Facilitator engaged. Scenario: ransomware affecting production trading systems.

Risk Description: Business continuity plan (BCP) has not been reviewed or updated since 2023 — does not reflect current cloud architecture or hybrid work environment
Remediation Notes: BCP review kicked off March 2026. External consultant engaged. Draft expected by August 2026.

Risk Description: Quarterly access review for Q4 2025 completed 47 days late — review process is manual and dependent on individual reminders
Remediation Notes: Q4 2025 review completed February 14 2026. Automated ServiceNow reminders configured for Q1 2026 forward. Monitoring to confirm on-time completion.

Risk Description: Security awareness training completion rate at 67% — 33% of employees have not completed mandatory annual training
Remediation Notes: Completion campaign launched March 2026. Manager reminders sent. Target: 95% completion by June 30.

Risk Description: Penetration test findings from November 2025 include 2 High-severity findings not yet remediated — SQL injection vulnerability in the client portal and insecure direct object reference in the API
Remediation Notes: Web application firewall rules applied as interim mitigation. Full remediation requires application code changes. Developer sprint scheduled for June 2026.

Risk Description: Change management process does not require security review for infrastructure changes under a defined threshold — 3 recent changes bypassed security assessment
Remediation Notes: Change management policy under revision. New security review threshold being defined. Expected policy update by July 1 2026.

Risk Description: Data classification scheme has not been applied to legacy SharePoint content — approximately 12000 documents have no sensitivity label
Remediation Notes: Microsoft Purview auto-labeling pilot running on 500 documents. Full rollout plan in development. Expected completion post-audit.

Risk Description: Audit log retention configured at 90 days in Microsoft 365 Purview — policy requires 2-year retention per ISO 27001 A.8.15 and SOC 2 CC7.2
Remediation Notes: Purview retention policy update in progress. Requires Compliance Administrator approval and testing. Interim: manual log export to Azure Blob (encrypted) weekly.
